title: A Call to Reason

'''''A Call to Reason''''' was a pamphlet written by [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and the early leaders of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] to counter the institutionalized [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] that described the Rebels as [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], murderers, and [[Thief/Legends|thieves]]. It contained detailed information on the atrocities being performed in the name of and by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. It was distributed on those [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] the Alliance felt needed a nudge to push them into alignment with the Alliance.<ref name="FP" />

{{Reb-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The background of the Empire as given here is different than what established later by the [[Prequel trilogy]]. Mon Mothma speaks of the "decades of peace" between the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the rise of the Empire, with Palpatine being elected President during the war but not declaring himself Emperor and exterminating the Jedi until much later.<ref name="FP" />
